word: H3867 - לָוָה - lâvâh - law-vaw' - Abide with

sections.paragraph:
Original: לוה

Transliteration: lâvâh

Phonetic: law-vaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to join, be joined
    1. (Qal) to join, be joined, attend
    2. (Niphal) to join oneself to, be joined unto
  2. to borrow, lend
    1. (Qal) to borrow
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to borrow, lend to

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1087,1088

Part(s) of speech: Verb
